name: Diamond Energy Partners, Inc.
summary: Diamond Energy Partners, Inc. does not have significant operations. The company intends to merge with or acquire a company engaged in an energy related business. Previously, it was engaged in the marketing of advertising rights to the All American Bowl, a high school senior football all-star game. The company was formerly known as AAB National Company and changed its name to Diamond Energy Partners, Inc. in 2005. Diamond Energy Partners was founded in 2004 and is based in Jupiter, Florida. Diamond Energy Partners, Inc. operates independently of Green Energy Group, Inc. as of June 04, 2004.
